title: Corsair SMP
description: A modpack for the Corsair SMP community
body:
# Corsair SMP

Corsair SMP is a customized modpack that originates from the robust yet user-friendly Create Live 4. This modpack is specifically crafted to cater to the members of the 'Corsair SMP' server community.  

In the spirit of Create Live 4, we continue to uphold the principle of keeping the modpack light and approachable, enabling newcomers to navigate through the realm of modpacks without feeling overwhelmed by extensive modifications. Our primary emphasis remains on the Create mod, which forms the core of our unique Minecraft experience.  

*Note:* while this modpack idea comes from an existing modpack, we've taken great care to redo all the custom recipes and remove any assets under copyright from the awesome Create Live team.

# 💟 Attributions 💟
Thanks to all the mod authors for their work and for letting us use their mod in our modpack.
